leadText: Dragon Hammer (Japanese: ドラゴンハンマー Dragon Hammer) is a damage-dealing Dragon-type move introduced in Generation VII. In Generation VII, it was the signature move of Alolan Exeggutor, but other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Dragon Hammer deals damage and has no secondary effect. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 1.1.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Dragon Hammer could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.2.0, it is selectable and functions as it did in the previous generation. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 2.0.1 of Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , Dragon Hammer could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 3.0.0, it is selectable and functions as it did in the previous generation.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user uses its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage. S V The user wields its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.
